items.title: Overview
items.summary: Top-level introduction to the secured demo application.
items.detail: This landing area introduces the authenticated workspace and anchors the rest of the framework pages after login.

items.title: Bootstrap & Configuration
items.summary: createServer() bootstrap, config loading, and static delivery.
items.detail: The page walks through createServer(), JSON config loading, and how the same runtime delivers both API endpoints and the React application.

items.title: Controllers & Routing
items.summary: File-based controllers and route security modes.
items.detail: This page shows the runtime-backed route catalog, controller files, and mixed public, Basic, and JWT security modes.

items.title: Security
items.summary: Basic Auth, JWT generation, and session verification.
items.detail: The page explains the Basic Auth login, JWT issuance, and protected session verification flow used by the workspace.

items.title: Lifecycle Hooks
items.summary: Startup, middleware, and shutdown extension points.
items.detail: The page shows registered initialize, startup, preInit, postInit, and security hooks together with their recorded runtime trace.

items.title: Service Registry
items.summary: Shared infrastructure services and lifecycle management.
items.detail: The Service Registry page surfaces the demo services that are registered during startup and inspected from the workspace.

items.title: Event System
items.summary: Framework events, application events, and EventBus flows.
items.detail: The EventBus page emits protected demo presets through the backend and writes the latest server-side message into the visible text field.

items.title: Scheduler
items.summary: Cron-driven background jobs inside the runtime.
items.detail: The scheduler page prepares the later live clock demo in which a recurring server-side job produces the visible time feed.

items.title: WebSocket
items.summary: JWT-protected real-time transport on the shared server.
items.detail: The WebSocket page prepares the later transport layer that forwards scheduler ticks and EventBus messages into the authenticated UI.

items.title: Metrics & Observability
items.detail: This page will collect the metrics endpoint, tracing notes, and runtime health references as the observability coverage grows.

items.title: Public API & Contracts
items.summary: Stable exports, types, and supported v1 contracts.
items.detail: A reference-focused page for the documented public API and framework contracts remains part of the planned documentation surface.
